name: @oxide-js/monorepo
description: Oxide-JS: A modular, high-performance machine learning library for TypeScript with Rust acceleration.

scripts.build: npm run build:rust && npm run build:ts
scripts.build:ts: npm run build -w packages/core && npm run build -w packages/layers
scripts.release:check: npm run build && npm test && npm pack --dry-run -w packages/core && npm pack --dry-run -w packages/layers
scripts.postinstall: node -e "try{require('child_process').execSync('npm run build:rust',{stdio:'inherit'})}catch(e){console.warn('[oxide-js] Rust build skipped — native acceleration unavailable.')}"

author: Akhyar
